stemHtml: Which option is correct regarding an aircraft equipped with a flight Director (FD) and an Automatic Flight Control System (AFCS)?

options.a: The FD and the AFCS have different modes and control panels.
options.b: The available modes are the same, but the AFCS control panel is different to that of the FD.
options.c: The available modes and the control panel are the same for both the FD and the AFCS.
options.d: The FD and the AFCS share the same control panel, but the available modes are different.
